assertions.title: getSettings returns defaults when localStorage empty

steps.action: Run test: 'returns defaults when localStorage is empty'
steps.expected: getSettings returns DEFAULT_SETTINGS with version: '1.0', resourcesPath: null, dashboardConfig: null
steps.observed: Test asserts settings.version === '1.0', settings.resourcesPath === null, settings.dashboardConfig === null, and settings has lastModified property — all passed

evidence.testName: returns defaults when localStorage is empty

assertions.testOutput: ✓ returns defaults when localStorage is empty (4 ms)

assertions.title: getSettings returns parsed settings from localStorage

steps.action: Run test: 'returns parsed settings from localStorage'
steps.expected: When valid JSON stored, returns parsed object
steps.observed: Test stores valid JSON with version: '2.0', resourcesPath: '/some/path', dashboardConfig: { theme: 'dark' } — all assertions passed confirming parsed values returned correctly

assertions.testOutput: ✓ returns parsed settings from localStorage (1 ms)

assertions.title: getSettings recovers from corrupted localStorage

steps.action: Run test: 'recovers from corrupted localStorage data'
steps.expected: Invalid JSON → catches error, returns DEFAULT_SETTINGS
steps.observed: Test sets '{invalid json!!!' in localStorage, calls getSettings, asserts version === '1.0', resourcesPath === null, dashboardConfig === null — all passed. console.error logged the SyntaxError as expected.

evidence.consoleErrors: Expected: 'Error reading settings: SyntaxError: Expected property name or '}' in JSON at position 1' — this is the expected error-handling path, not a real error

assertions.testOutput: ✓ recovers from corrupted localStorage data (22 ms)

assertions.title: saveSettings persists and adds lastModified

steps.action: Run test: 'persists settings and adds lastModified'
steps.expected: Stores JSON, sets lastModified to ISO date, returns { success: true }
steps.observed: Test calls saveSettings with { version: '1.0', resourcesPath: '/new/path', dashboardConfig: null }, asserts result === { success: true }, stored JSON has resourcesPath: '/new/path', lastModified is a string — all passed

assertions.testOutput: ✓ persists settings and adds lastModified (1 ms)

steps.expected: setItem throws → returns { success: false, error: <message> }
steps.observed: Test mocks setItem to throw 'QuotaExceededError', asserts result.success === false, result.error === 'QuotaExceededError' — passed. console.error logged as expected.

evidence.consoleErrors: Expected: 'Error saving settings: Error: QuotaExceededError' — this is the expected error-handling path, not a real error

assertions.title: getSetting retrieves specific key

steps.action: Run test: 'retrieves a specific key value'
steps.observed: Test stores { version: '1.0', resourcesPath: '/custom/path' }, calls getSetting('resourcesPath'), asserts value === '/custom/path' — passed

assertions.testOutput: ✓ retrieves a specific key value (1 ms)

assertions.title: updateSetting merges single key-value pair

steps.action: Run tests: 'merges a single key-value pair' and 'preserves other keys when updating one'
steps.expected: Updates one key while preserving others
steps.observed: First test: updates resourcesPath to '/updated/path' while version stays '1.0'. Second test: updates version to '2.0' while resourcesPath stays '/old/path' and dashboardConfig stays { sections: [] } — both passed

evidence.testName: merges a single key-value pair into existing settings + preserves other keys when updating one

assertions.testOutput:
✓ merges a single key-value pair into existing settings (1 ms)
✓ preserves other keys when updating one (1 ms)

steps.action: Run test: 'removes settings key from localStorage'
steps.observed: Test stores settings, calls resetSettings(), asserts localStorage.getItem(SETTINGS_KEY) === null — passed

assertions.title: getDashboardConfig / saveDashboardConfig work correctly

steps.action: Run tests: 'getDashboardConfig returns null when no config saved', 'saveDashboardConfig persists config and returns success', 'getDashboardConfig returns saved config'
steps.expected: Get returns config; save persists and returns success
steps.observed: Test 1: getDashboardConfig() returns null when empty — passed. Test 2: saveDashboardConfig persists config, returns { success: true } — passed. Test 3: getDashboardConfig after saving returns the saved config object — passed

evidence.testName: getDashboardConfig returns null when no config saved + saveDashboardConfig persists config and returns success + getDashboardConfig returns saved config

assertions.testOutput:
✓ getDashboardConfig returns null when no config saved
✓ saveDashboardConfig persists config and returns success (1 ms)
✓ getDashboardConfig returns saved config (1 ms)

assertions.title: getResourcesPath / saveResourcesPath work correctly

steps.action: Run tests: 'getResourcesPath returns null when no path saved', 'saveResourcesPath persists path and returns success', 'getResourcesPath returns saved path'
steps.expected: Get returns path (or null); save persists and returns success
steps.observed: Test 1: getResourcesPath() returns null when empty — passed. Test 2: saveResourcesPath('/new/resources/path') persists and returns { success: true } — passed. Test 3: getResourcesPath after saving returns '/stored/path' — passed

evidence.testName: getResourcesPath returns null when no path saved + saveResourcesPath persists path and returns success + getResourcesPath returns saved path

assertions.testOutput:
✓ getResourcesPath returns null when no path saved
✓ saveResourcesPath persists path and returns success
✓ getResourcesPath returns saved path

summary: Tested 10 assertions (VAL-SETTINGS-001 through VAL-SETTINGS-010): all 10 passed. The test file contains 17 tests total (7 additional tests cover edge cases like missing keys and idempotent reset). All tests passed with exit code 0.
